title: Update Settings
description: Configure the Google Search Scraper parameters

content.introduction: Configure the scraper parameters to control how Google Search results are collected. These settings include pagination, location, language, and device type options.

scraperParams.title: Scraper Parameters
scraperParams.content: Set these parameters in the `params` object:

rows.description: Maximum search result pages to crawl per keyword. Google limits to ~300-400 total results.
Sets IP origin country and Google domain (e.g., `google.fr` for France). Default: `United States`
Geographic bias for results (state, city). Use Get Geolocation to find valid values.
Language for search results. Defaults to English for the chosen country.
If `true`, returns mobile device results; otherwise desktop results.

proTips.content: Use the Get Geolocation endpoint to discover valid `location` values.
Higher `max_pages` values will collect more results but use more credits.

seo.title: Update Settings - Google Search Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure Google Search Scraper parameters including pagination, location, and language settings.
